title: SUBACUTE - 211info
text: TRILLIUM FAMILY SERVICES SUBACUTE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers brief and intensive on-site psychiatric services that stabilize youth after a significant emotional or behavioral incident. Services include psychiatric evaluation, medication management, individual and family therapies, nursing care, school instruction during the school year, and 24-hour care in a secure facility. 3415 SE Powell Boulevard Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Ages 5-17 who are in need of 24-hour inpatient treatment and stabilization for significant behavioral and mental health challenges Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 234-9591 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 234-9591 Main phone Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurances DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Child/Adolescent Residential Treatment Facilities Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - INTENSIVE COMMUNITY TREATMENT SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MENTAL HEALTH PROMOTION PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - PSYCHIATRIC DAY TREATMENT MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - PSYCHIATRIC RESIDENTIAL MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUNG ADULT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
